privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the target file paths and quarantine settings are synthetically generated and dynamically injected via setup scripts. The rule ID (100550), monitored source directory (/home/ga/contracts), target quarantine directory (/home/ga/quarantine), and active response script path (/var/ossec/active-response/bin/quarantine.sh) are explicitly defined in the task description and checked in the verifier. The evaluation relies on an automated live-fire test run during the export stage to ensure files dropped in the monitored directory are automatically moved and appended with the .suspect extension.
